blockers.description: Live UAT test 6 still fails after 05-08: active card flashes too briefly, no 'Transcribing...' label. 05-04 filename + 05-07 duration ARE confirmed live on new jobs (test4.mp4: dur=136.7, orig=test4.mp4); only active-card Preparing/Transcribing feedback fails.
blockers.workaround: none yet — needs live diagnosis to distinguish H1 (warm-model+short-clip timing) / H2 (progress WS events not reaching card live) / H3 (snapshot status='starting'+percent:0, 05-08 premise false for part of the window).

human_actions_pending.action: Drop a LONGER clip (cold + warm model) against the fresh servers and capture: (a) browser dev-tools WS frame log for /ws/jobs/{id}/events, (b) backend log of stage_changed(preparing|transcribing) + progress emits for that job id, (c) the exact snapshot status/percent sequence the card receives.
human_actions_pending.context: A short warm clip is the worst case for observing feedback and hid the bug through three code-correct gap closures. Live evidence is required to distinguish H1/H2/H3 before any more code is written.

decisions.decision: Executed 05-08 as FE-only (Option A) — reinterpret already-trusted snapshot fields (status+percent+stage) for the ingesting window.
decisions.rationale: Mirrors 05-06 style; preserves 05-04 H3+H4 + 05-05 WS-only invariants. Option B (BE-persisted transient status) rejected as heavier/riskier.

decisions.decision: Ran the gap-closure executor in SEQUENTIAL mode on the main tree (not worktree-isolated).
decisions.rationale: web/node_modules is gitignored — a fresh worktree would lack it and break vitest/tsc/build. Single-plan wave, no parallelism benefit.

next_action: Resume by gathering LIVE evidence for the active-card feedback failure: with the fresh servers (still running), have the user drop a LONGER clip and capture the browser WS frame log + the BE stage_changed/progress log for that job id. Use that to distinguish H1 (timing) vs H2 (progress not reaching card) vs H3 (snapshot status='starting' mismatch). Then /gsd-plan-phase 5 --gaps to create the next gap-closure plan, /gsd-execute-phase 5 --gaps-only to execute, and re-run /gsd-verify-work 5 live.
context_notes: Three successive gap closures (05-05, 05-06, 05-08) each passed all code-level/jsdom tests + goal-backward verification (23/23) yet the live human UAT symptom recurred. The root methodological failure: jsdom + grep guards + BE/FE unit green do NOT catch the live WS-connect-timing / perceptual-feedback bug, and 05-08 codified a runtime-status premise (DB='ingesting' for the whole window) from code-reading without live confirmation — the live job was observed in status='starting'. The next plan MUST require live evidence before code and must not declare the gap closed on jsdom+grep alone. See .continue-here.md BLOCKING CONSTRAINTS.
